channel.title: PluginStream Blog
channel.description: Stay updated with the latest features, guides, and insights from the PluginStream ecosystem.

item.title: 1.6k+ Instant Games Added! Fast & No Install
item.description: We have officially integrated a massive library of over 1600+ high-quality games directly into the PluginStream ecosystem. Play instantly without installation!

item.title: Support Our Developers: New Offers for Maintenance
item.description: Learn how you can help keep PluginStream fast, ad-free, and always working by participating in our new optional support offers.

item.title: Introducing PluginStream: The Future of Modular Streaming
item.description: Discover how PluginStream is revolutionizing the way we consume content with its open-source, plugin-based architecture.

item.title: Step-by-Step Guide: Setting Up Your First Repository
item.description: A comprehensive guide for beginners to help you add extensions and start streaming your favorite content in minutes.

item.title: TV Version Update: Black Screen Fixes & Performance Boost
item.description: The latest TV extension update addresses crashes and optimizes remote control response for a smoother experience.
